name: Formpad
one_liner: Form builder for indie SaaS founders — auto-generates forms backed by Supabase. (The product is the form-flair repo.)
notes: form-flair IS formpad (confirmed 2026-06-04). Pre-factory Lovable build (created 2026-03-22, last push 2026-04-03 — predates Hamzaish, so onboarded INTO the factory, not built with it). Dormant since April. Has real code (src/, supabase/) + Playwright/Vitest tests. Code lives locally at ~/Claude/form-flair (map it in code-paths.local.json). Next step when revived: /work-on formpad → assess state, write scope.md + status.md, decide validate vs continue-build.
